name: Oriental Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the Pork Shoulder into 1/4-inch strips.
2. In a large skillet, sauté the pork strips over medium heat until browned and cooked through.
3. Add orange juice to the skillet and simmer for about 5 minutes.
4. Stir in salt and pepper, then add soy sauce and water chestnuts.
5. Cook for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Add bean sprouts and cook until just wilted.
7. Push the pork mixture aside and add cornstarch mixed with cold water to form a slurry.
8. Pour the slurry into the skillet and stir gently to combine.
9. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly to avoid lumps.
10. Add chopped green onions and cook until just wilted.
11. Serve over hot cooked rice.
